text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 63 

SUBMSN_CLR_CD 

LABEL: Submission Clarification Code 

DESCRIPTION: Code indicating that the pharmacist is clarifying the submission. For beneficiaries living in long-term 
care (LTC) facilities, this variable indicates how many days’ supply of the medication was dispensed by 
the long-term care pharmacy and provides some details about the dispensing
